name: Hamsters of Hamsterdale
overview: Hamsters of Hamsterdale follows a motley crew of hamsters, the heroic protectors of their 8-year-old owner Harry, who they mistake as their King and beloved ruler of their elaborate colorful-tubed kingdom.
